subject: fix(debug): clean up copy timer on unmount, fix dedup React re-render
body:
Two bad practices found during final review:

1. DebugPill copyReport setTimeout leaked on unmount — setCopyLabel could
   fire after component destroyed. Added copyTimerRef with cleanup effect
   and clearTimeout before each new timer.

2. debugLog deduplication mutated existing entry object in-place (count++,
   timestamp update). React subscribers do setEntries([...allEntries])
   which creates a new array but same object references inside. React
   compares by key+ref and skips re-render for the mutated entry — the
   x{count} badge never updated visually. Fixed by replacing the entry
   with a spread copy ({ ...last, count, timestamp }) so React sees a
   new reference and re-renders the row.

Tags: debug, bugfix, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
